name: RABBIT-FILE-BACKLOG-4
title: Missing test coverage for several spec invariants and edge cases
description: Gaps identified during housekeeping review: (1) no test for spec invariant 'Direct edits to item.json on bug-backlog-files are prohibited' (no enforcement mechanism exists, only documentation); (2) no test that commit_item does not mutate caller's dict; (3) no test for read_branch handling corrupted/non-JSON item.json (silent skip branch); (4) no test for _worktree cleanup when git worktree add itself fails; (5) no test for _init_orphan_branch failure paths; (6) no test for --filed-by default fallback to 'unknown' when git config user.name is empty; (7) no test for feature names with uppercase, digits, dots, or non-ASCII characters.
